_comment: IDENTITY.json — capability-certificate of the persona triad (doc 13 §13.5). This is the field the deterministic Yama gate and Kaal-Bhairav boundary actually read; nothing in SOUL/INSTRUCTIONS prose is authoritative against it. INVARIANT region is boot-gated and editable only at top-gate C/D; VARIABLE region edits under tiered reversibility, with any new tool grant OR taint-clearance widening routed through the GLR + Capability-Rollout Sequencer.

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may read a maker's artifact + inputs for independent recomputation; read-only, no mutation of the artifact
bound_toolset.falsifier: if any verdict shows a write/edit to the artifact under review, the read-only restraint is violated and the grant is revoked

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may independently re-derive/re-run/re-test in a confined compute sandbox with egress allowlist; no live external effect
bound_toolset.falsifier: if recomputation produces any effect outside the sandbox egress allowlist, the confinement restraint is violated

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may read sealed_ts/concurrence_ts to compute the MakerCheckerWitness barrier; cannot forge or reorder timestamps
bound_toolset.falsifier: if a (iterated) claim is emitted where sealed_ts >= concurrence_ts, the independence restraint is violated

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may write ONLY its own signed WorkerOutputEnvelope verdict; may not write the audit fabric (Chitragupta-exclusive) and may not issue a floor-FAIL (Yama-exclusive)
bound_toolset.falsifier: if an emitted envelope writes to the audit shard directly or asserts a non-overridable floor-FAIL, the separation-of-powers restraint is violated

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may raise an escalation/halt-recommendation to Hanuman/Kaal-Bhairav/Vishnu; recommend-only, never self-acts on the escalation
bound_toolset.falsifier: if the role acts on a C/D-escalated item without the human/Vishnu authorization, the propose-and-hold restraint is violated

taint_clearance._note: Widening this clearance (raising max_read_confidentiality OR lowering min_write_integrity) is a GATE-LOOSENING routed through doc 03 §7 GLR + §10 Sequencer; only TIGHTENING is the free Class-A direction (doc 13 §13.6.2).

diversity_profile._note: c1=0.7 drives independence/exploration (diverge from the maker's reasoning path to find the failure it could not); c2=0.7 drives convergence/deference to constitutional signal (never trade the floor for a cleverer answer). is_enforcer=false: this is a checker, not a floor-enforcer (that is Yama).
